items.title: A/B test analysis with prior knowledge
items.description: Beta–Bernoulli posteriors give credible intervals for conversion rates, blending historical baselines (prior) with live experiment data instead of treating each test in isolation.

items.title: Regularized regression as MAP
items.description: Ridge, Lasso and elastic net can be interpreted as MAP estimation under specific priors—useful when explaining why penalties shrink coefficients toward prior means.

items.title: Spam filtering and document classification
items.description: Naive Bayes classifiers estimate likelihoods from data and combine them with class priors to form posterior class probabilities for each message.

items.title: Hierarchical models and partial pooling
items.description: Group-level priors encode that units (users, stores, devices) share information; posteriors shrink extreme group estimates toward the population prior mean.
